ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Native country of the individual */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marital status */,
  "edu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education record associated with this demographic record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employment record associated with this demographic record */,
  "inc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income record associated with this demographic record */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the individual */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the individual */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the individual */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_edu_id FOREIGN KEY ("edu_id") REFERENCES education ("edu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_inc_id FOREIGN KEY ("inc_id") REFERENCES income ("inc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employment ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "edu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record associated with this education record */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the individual (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad) */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "degree_year" INTEGER /* Year the degree was obtained */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the degree was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record associated with this employment record */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workclass */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of employment */,
  "employment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of employment (if applicable) */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, retired) */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "employer_street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the employer */,
  "employer_city" TEXT /* City of the employer */,
  "employer_state" TEXT /* State of the employer */,
  "employer_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the employer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("rel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "inc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record associated with this income record */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "annual_salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the individual */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus received by the individual */,
  "tax_bracket" TEXT /* Tax bracket of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_employment" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id", "emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_income" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record */,
  "inc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id", "inc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_labels" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employment record */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id", "label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_labels" (
  "inc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income record */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inc_id", "label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual (e.g., Never-married, Married-civ-spouse) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Type of workclass (e.g., State-gov, Self-emp-not-inc) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the workclass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occ_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual (e.g., Adm-clerical, Exec-managerial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occ_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "rel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the individual (e.g., Not-in-family, Husband) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
